text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's summer camp. I want to use this chance to
prepare Agnes Tachyon for her upcoming
G1—the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But somehow, I find myself doing workouts at her
request instead.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
141, 142... You're almost there! Put some back
into it, guinea pig!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite it being summer camp, I'm subject to her
experimentation from dusk until dawn, like
always.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
...149, and 150! Okay, stop! Now let me measure
your endorphin secretion levels.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At that moment, several reporters come running
on over.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: You are Agnes Tachyon, correct?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
...That is correct. I'm sorry, but can you come
back later? I'm in the middle of an experiment
right now...

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
Can you tell me more about why you didn't enter
the Gekkei Hai?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just before summer camp started, Agnes Tachyon
decided to withdraw from the Gekkei Hai.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Originally a special race meant to stimulate
excitement within the racing community, the news
spread like wildfire.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There were even voices criticizing her lack of
commitment.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Dear me. I knew I saw some unfamiliar faces sneak
into the summer camp...
choice_data_list:
You need to go through the academy first if you
want to have an interview.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I push my way through the throng of reporters,
but find the microphones previously pointed at
her suddenly all facing me.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
As her trainer, do you understand the problems
caused by your racer's sudden cancellation?

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
Although she is a student of Tracen Academy,
there have been rumors claiming that she lacked
motivation even for her debut race.
choice_data_list:
As I just said, you will have to make a formal
application in order to conduct an interview...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
They're much closer to a guinea pig than an
actual trainer. So, it would be much more
constructive if you directed your questions at me.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
They're much closer to a guinea pig than an
actual trainer. So, it would be much more
constructive if you directed your questions at me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Once again, the microphones surround Agnes
Tachyon.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
So, as a highly talented Umamusume, what are
your thoughts regarding the future of the
Umamusume world and your responsibilities to it?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Unlike the student council president, I am
down-to-earth.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Nevertheless, if that is your question, then let me
pose another.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Suppose that you succeeded in eliciting a
response from me. Would my answer really
contribute to the future of Umamusume? Can you
explain to me the significance of the time spent
on this?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: I can't stand such trivial usage of time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon turns away from the flinching
reporters.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Should we get going, guinea pig? It appears
today is not a day fit for experimentation.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: Tch!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can't help but feel a nagging uneasiness at the
reporters' visible frustration.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The next day...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
"Troublemaker in the Umamusume Community,
Agnes Tachyon. Heh-heh-heh, what an amusing
provocation!"

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
"Forgoing her summer camp training for
recreational experimentation, this Umamusume
exposes her trainer, whom she refers to as 'guinea
pig,' to her cruel instruments of science..."

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
"With an outlook of indifference and apathy to
the future of Umamusume..."

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
This is incredible! Their malice is apparent, but
they didn't fabricate a single word!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She seems in high spirits, but if this situation goes
on, her professional career might be negatively
impacted.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Not to mention, I haven't even heard her reason
for backing out of the Gekkei Hai either.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hmm? Is something the matter, Trainer? Why the
long face?
choice_data_list: Why did you withdraw from the race?
Why did you withdraw from the race?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Oh? Are you still curious about that?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Now that I think about it, you really don't know
why, do you? I suppose that does hinder your
duties as my trainer.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Sadly, there are unavoidable circumstances at
hand preventing me from telling you more.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As expected, she has no intention of sharing her
reasons.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But as it stands, I won't be able to protect her
when the time comes.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Worried, you say. Hmm... That's right, you are quite the worrywart.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hm... Let me preface this by saying that this
withholding of information is a conscious
decision.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I dropped out of the Gekkei Hai for a good
reason.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she tells me this, she looks me square in the
eyes. Her tone is soft but her expression is
unusually honest.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
If everything goes well, we'll have a nice long talk
about it. I can promise you that.
choice_data_list: (There's so much I'm in the dark about...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Contrary to what the article claimed, I know she's
not indifferent. She has some kind of plan in
mind, I'm sure of it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I nod in silent agreement, to which she replies
with a small smile of relief.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Mhm, thank you.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
All right. With that out of the way, let's hit the
beach! Nice blue skies and not too hot—it's the
perfect day to conduct experiments!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Ha-ha-ha! Don't be shy! With luck, we'll manage
to finish up by the end of the day!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
To tell you the truth, Plan A has finally moved on
to the hypothesis testing phase!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I'll let you pick for today! Would you like to do
strength training or beach running?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Splendid choice! In that case, count the reps for
me, will you?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heh, of course. You're still out of commission
from earlier testing.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
To verify the hypothesis for Plan A, my own body
will be required.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Do you have the tally counter in hand? Then let's
start!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For the first time in a while, I spend the day
watching over her training.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff! Heh-heh, heh-heh-heh!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Yes! That felt great! Hardly a problem! At last,
success!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After going beyond her original goal, her body
gives out onto the sand.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: ...Success!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I look over at Agnes Tachyon and see a dazzling
smile on her face.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Okay. I'll be running laps around the beach, so
record my times!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Of course. You're still out of commission from
earlier testing.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
To verify the hypothesis for Plan A, my own body
will be required.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Do you have the stopwatch in hand? Then let's
start!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Without wasting a second, she takes off into a
run. The horizon quickly swallows up her figure.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Ahaha, hahahaha! Yes! It is within grasp, finally!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she returns, her eyes are ablaze with
excitement. I haven't seen her this fired up in a
while.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She catches her breath as her body gives out and
lands on the sand.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: ...Success!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I look over at Agnes Tachyon and see her
grinning from ear to ear.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next day, she formally announces her plan to
run in the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The heated criticism directed at her frivolous
attitude is certainly no laughing matter, but...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... There really were no false statements in
the articles.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I thought, she's paying no heed to the
naysayers.
